layer_separation_rules.Field: must not depend on Cognition, Runtime, Bootstrap
layer_separation_rules.Cognition: must not depend on Runtime, Bootstrap (TYPE_CHECKING guards exempt)

violations.rule: Field must not depend on Cognition
violations.rationale: RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py is the Stage 24/28 integration point. Cognition and Runtime imports were explicitly required by Stage 24 and Stage 28 prompt instructions. The engine acts as the orchestration coordinator — not a pure field primitive.

violations.rule: Field must not depend on Cognition
violations.rationale: RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py is the Stage 24/28 integration point. Cognition and Runtime imports were explicitly required by Stage 24 and Stage 28 prompt instructions. The engine acts as the orchestration coordinator — not a pure field primitive.

violations.rule: Field must not depend on Runtime
violations.rationale: RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py is the Stage 24/28 integration point. Cognition and Runtime imports were explicitly required by Stage 24 and Stage 28 prompt instructions. The engine acts as the orchestration coordinator — not a pure field primitive.

note: The 3 architecture flags in Field/RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py are intentional by-design couplings mandated by Stages 24 and 28. Pure field primitives (topology, propagator, packet registry, etc.) maintain full layer isolation. The engine is the designated cross-layer integration node.
